{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Navigator’s Wheel
| introduced = ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Navigator’s Wheel]] represents the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
